calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Date For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Teanna L. Ward, CSR#11918.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff Nara Bank, a corportion.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Chakra Salonspa Inc., a California Corporation dba Chakra Salonspa dba Salon 256
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered. Declaration of Anfrew S. Park in support of Default Judgment on file. Order granting waiver of appearance of witness at Default Prove-up hearing on file.
After testimony, evidence received and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $483,167.09
Prejudgment interest at the annual rate of 4.75 % $46,341.02
Costs $491.85.00 Attorney Fees in the amount of $2825.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $534,493.01
Judgment signed.
